namespace RecipeSharing.Models;

public class Recipe
{
    public int Id { get; set; }
    public string Title { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string Category { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string Ingredients { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public string Steps { get; set; } = string.Empty;
    public double AverageRating { get; set; }
    public int RatingCount { get; set; }
}

public static class RecipeStore
{
    public static List<Recipe> Recipes { get; } = new()
    {
        new Recipe { Id = 1, Title = "Classic Margherita Pizza", Category = "Italian", Ingredients = "Pizza dough, Tomato sauce, Fresh mozzarella, Basil, Olive oil", Steps = "1. Preheat oven to 475°F
2. Roll out dough
3. Spread sauce
4. Add mozzarella
5. Bake 10-12 minutes
6. Top with fresh basil" },
        new Recipe { Id = 2, Title = "Spaghetti Carbonara", Category = "Italian", Ingredients = "Spaghetti, Pancetta, Eggs, Parmesan, Black pepper", Steps = "1. Cook pasta al dente
2. Fry pancetta until crispy
3. Mix eggs and parmesan
4. Toss hot pasta with pancetta
5. Stir in egg mixture off heat
6. Season with pepper" },
        new Recipe { Id = 3, Title = "Chicken Tikka Masala", Category = "Indian", Ingredients = "Chicken thighs, Yogurt, Tomato sauce, Cream, Garam masala, Cumin, Turmeric", Steps = "1. Marinate chicken in yogurt and spices
2. Grill or broil chicken
3. Simmer tomato sauce with spices
4. Add cream
5. Add chicken to sauce
6. Serve with rice or naan" },
        new Recipe { Id = 4, Title = "Vegetable Pad Thai", Category = "Thai", Ingredients = "Rice noodles, Tofu, Bean sprouts, Peanuts, Lime, Tamarind paste, Fish sauce", Steps = "1. Soak rice noodles
2. Press and cube tofu
3. Make pad thai sauce
4. Stir-fry tofu
5. Add noodles and sauce
6. Top with peanuts and lime" },
        new Recipe { Id = 5, Title = "Beef Tacos", Category = "Mexican", Ingredients = "Ground beef, Taco shells, Lettuce, Tomato, Cheese, Sour cream, Taco seasoning", Steps = "1. Brown ground beef
2. Add taco seasoning
3. Warm taco shells
4. Assemble with toppings
5. Serve with salsa" },
        new Recipe { Id = 6, Title = "Guacamole", Category = "Mexican", Ingredients = "Avocados, Lime juice, Cilantro, Red onion, Jalapeño, Salt", Steps = "1. Mash avocados
2. Add lime juice
3. Fold in diced onion, cilantro, jalapeño
4. Season with salt
5. Serve with chips" },
        new Recipe { Id = 7, Title = "Green Curry", Category = "Thai", Ingredients = "Green curry paste, Coconut milk, Chicken, Thai basil, Bamboo shoots, Fish sauce", Steps = "1. Fry curry paste in coconut cream
2. Add chicken
3. Pour in coconut milk
4. Add vegetables
5. Season with fish sauce and sugar
6. Garnish with Thai basil" },
        new Recipe { Id = 8, Title = "Palak Paneer", Category = "Indian", Ingredients = "Spinach, Paneer, Onion, Garlic, Ginger, Cream, Garam masala", Steps = "1. Blanch and puree spinach
2. Fry paneer cubes until golden
3. Sauté onion, garlic, ginger
4. Add spinach puree
5. Stir in cream and spices
6. Add paneer cubes" },
    };

    public static List<string> Categories =>
        Recipes.Select(r => r.Category).Distinct().OrderBy(c => c).ToList();
}

data.content:
The project is ready. Here's a summary of what was created:

**Project:** `RecipeSharing/` — Blazor Web App (.NET 11, Interactive Server per-component)

**Pages (Static SSR):**
- `/` — Homepage with recipe categories grid
- `/category/{name}` — Browse recipes in a category
- `/recipe/{id}` — Recipe detail (ingredients, steps, + interactive rating)

**Interactive Components (`@rendermode InteractiveServer`):**
- `StarRating.razor` — Click-to-rate 1–5 stars widget
- `/submit` — Submit Recipe form with validation (title, category, ingredients, steps)

**Architecture:** Most pages render as static SSR for fast load times. Only the rating widget and submit form opt into server interactivity, matching the requirement that read-only pages stay static.

Run with `cd RecipeSharing && dotnet run`.
